powers.label: Code Review
powers.prompt: Perform a code review for {key} "{summary}". Check security, quality, performance, and testing.

powers.label: Security Scan
powers.prompt: Run a security scan on changes for {key} "{summary}". Check for vulnerabilities, secrets, and compliance.

powers.label: Compliance
powers.prompt: Check compliance for {key} "{summary}" against PII, PCI-DSS, GDPR, and accessibility standards.

sections.title: Technical Debt
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Task AND labels = tech-debt

powers.label: Assess Impact
powers.prompt: Assess the impact of technical debt item {key} "{summary}". Include risk, effort to fix, and priority recommendation.
